[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110100111 6
1 0111111101 8
2 0000000101 2
3 0110011000 4
4 1011111001 7
5 1011101111 8
6 1100111100 6
7 0010100010 3

01 10 0110100111 6 match 0
12 21 0111111111 9
23 32 0111111101 8 match 1
34 43 0110011101 6
45 54 1111111001 8
56 65 1011111111 9
67 76 1111111111 a
70 07 1110111110 8

02 20 0111111111 9
13 31 0110100111 6 match 0
24 42 0111111101 8 match 1
35 53 1011111101 8
46 64 1111111111 a
57 75 1111111101 9
60 06 1011101111 8 match 5
71 17 1110111111 9

25 52 1111111101 9

47 74 1110111100 7

72 27 1111111101 9

37 73 1100111101 7
